column1: # huge_app.csv had a single 3 MB app partition with no room for an
# OTA write target — Update.begin() returned NO_PARTITION (err=10).
# This layout reserves two 3 MB app slots so Update.h can write the
# inactive one and then flip the boot pointer.
# Flash budget on the Core2 (16 MB): bootloader/partition table (~64 KB)
# + nvs (20 KB) + otadata (8 KB) + app0 (3 MB) + app1 (3 MB) +
# remainder as SPIFFS for future use. NVS offset matches huge_app so
# polarity flag) survive the layout change.
